title: Buttery Dense Middle Eastern Fattoush
description: A rich and satisfying loaf of bread perfect for any occasion, featuring a beautifully browned crust and a soft, airy interior.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, sugar, and sesame seeds.
Add melted butter and mix until dough comes together.
Gradually add water and whole milk, and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round loaf.
Place the loaf on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the loaf from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Slice the loaf in half and serve warm.
